text: I made a simple script that automatically downloads all new posts from this Telegram channel every hour and saves them to my database for later analysis.
Here's a quick tool: input several usernames and it will link their accounts across X, Telegram, and Instagram to show common connections.
I built a central dashboard that collects and indexes all messages from multiple groups so I can search them easily later.
My script analyzes 500 users in this group and ranks them by activity level and sentiment score.
Whenever someone says something suspicious, my bot automatically creates a case, assigns it to a moderator, and tracks the resolution.
Every night my program scrapes the last 24 hours of posts from 12 different channels and stores them locally.
This tool helps me see which accounts are likely the same person across different platforms by matching writing style and timing.
I created a heatmap showing which topics make this community most angry or excited over the past month.
